subject: [PATCH v3 13/28] nfsd: make nfsd4_callback_ops->prepare operation bool return

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch modifies the nfsd4_callback_ops->prepare operation to return a boolean value indicating whether processing should continue or not. The change is made to handle allocation failures during CB_NOTIFY operations, where processing should be stopped if an allocation fails. The modification affects several callback preparation functions and ensures that the correct behavior is maintained in case of allocation errors.
